reviews.review_description:
The game is amazing, I love the idea of it, a guitar hero-style game with a great modding community and fun controls. But some of the controls are a bit finicky, like the guitar and bass strum even when your hand is nowhere near the guitar and sometimes the strumming doesn’t work or register.
The keyboard and drums also have troubles, you need to press very hard down onto the keyboard to register notes, and the drums need to be hit perfectly with the tip of the stick leading to missing a lot of notes.
Besides those issues the game is fun, but the devs REALLY need to fix these.
Fun game really like it but network issues make the game less fun.

developer_response.body: The network issue had been fixed. Sorry for that. Please try again.

reviews.review_description: amazing game but the multiplayer and mods don't work because it says no internet connection please fix this

developer_response.body: The network issue had been fixed. Sorry for that. Please try again.

reviews.review_description: I was liking this game at first but now ( now it's too late for a refund) it won't connect for matching with other players. Keeps saying "Network connection required" but I am connected to network. I've followed all the trouble shooting suggestions, uninstalled, cleared cache, changed wifi networks, connected to hot spot, hard reset and so on. The only game having issue is this one. Don't bother purchasing until they get off their duffs and fix this.

developer_response.body: Hello! We’re very sorry about the trouble you experienced. The connectivity issue has been fixed, and everything is back up and running. Please try jumping back in—you should be able to connect without any problems now. Thanks for sticking with us!

reviews.review_description:
It's fun for what it is! I was excited to be able to play the game with more than just the base songs, my friend was going on about it being a key feature...

 I am rather disappointed that the network issues seem to still be persisting though.

reviews.review_title: Great game! Pls add more songs.
reviews.review_description: I am liking this game. I think it is easy to follow and really enjoyable. One request though for the  price, can you regularly upload new good songs? Pls

reviews.review_title: Network Required Error, Devs please fix
reviews.review_description: This game was my favorite but it recently started showing an error, saying "network required" even though internet is connected. Hope the devs fix it soon because I really loved this game. Will reinstall after the issue has been resolved, feel free to message me when its back and we can battle.

developer_response.body: Hey! So sorry we let you down. The network bug is officially gone! It means the world that we’re your favorite—reinstall and let’s get back to the music. See you there! 🎸

reviews.review_description:
*no wonder its on sale"
So I bought this game a few months  ago, and Q10now all the sudden.  I CANT play. Says no network connection. It's Def not me and my internet. Ive searched all over  online to see if theres a reason or fix and come up with nothing. I feel like its only fair for a refund to the people that have bought this app recently, since there was no warning. Or anything and clearly Noone is in a hurry to fix it. Cause it's been like that for a a month ? Danielle

developer_response.body: Hi Danielle, we hear your frustration loud and clear, and we’re so sorry for the silence while you were dealing with this. We promise we weren’t ignoring the issue—it just took our team a bit longer than expected to officially crush that network bug. The good news is, it's fixed now! Everything is back online, and we’d love for you to give it another shot. Thanks for your patience even when it was running thin!

reviews.review_description: Why does it say network connection not found

developer_response.body: Hi! The network issue is now fixed and you can enjoy the game normally again. We apologize for the technical difficulties and thank you for your patience.

reviews.review_description: It keeps on saying network connection not connected when it is you guys need to fix this

developer_response.body: Hi! The network issue is now fixed and you can enjoy the game normally again. We apologize for the technical difficulties and thank you for your patience.

reviews.review_description: The game itself especially Guitars are great to play But the drums are awful they really need some work after playing games like Paradiddle , Smash drums and Drums rock where you actually have a drum kit to play the invisable kit is this game is near impossable to play and next to no feed back on controllers to feel like you hit anything

The one thing that had me sold was that it had built in mod support for downloading songs. Cut to actually booting up the game and getting past the tutorial, just to find out that oh no, the game is having network issues. Checked my internet multiple times just to find out: it’s not my internet. You literally cannot do something the game advertises which is downloading songs from their mod section, let alone actually playing with other players. The other extremely game breaking issue is that the drums don’t hit every note. You can hit the drum as many times as you want, but don’t expect to keep a combo going: you can’t.

developer_response.body: So sorry for the letdown! We’ve officially squashed that connection bug. Mods and online play are now working perfectly. We'd love for you to give us another chance to show you the game's full potential!

reviews.review_description: I recently bought this game and was super excited to use the mod songs and play with friends but for some reason, the game would never connect to my internet which seemed to be the case for a lot of other players. Overall, all of the instruments are decent but I’m just really disappointed that I couldn’t play online.

developer_response.body: So sorry for the letdown! We’ve officially squashed that connection bug. 🛠️ Mods and online play are now working perfectly. We'd love for you to give us another chance to show you the game's full potential!

reviews.review_description: From the annoyingly small hitbox on the drums to the terribly inaccurate strumming. Im sure thats why this game is always on sale. Im sure you could find a much better music game with a little time and effort
No new mods nor players just play clone hero or YARG on pc (or idk play the real guitar hero or rockband)
Drums need a bit work on accuracy.  Im hitting but says I missed. The music list could use some Latin Artist like Ozuna etc

reviews.review_title: Has potential to be top 10 quest games
reviews.review_description:
The game itself has a lot of potential to offer you, but currently most of that potential is untapped. The guitar and bass feeling amazing to play, but the keyboard is underwhelming while the drums are just straight up impractical to play.

(Seriously, the drums need a massive rework, all the other instruments give you a short window of opportunity to hit your notes while the drums feel they need to be frame perfect. Me and my friends actively avoid the drums at all costs because they feel awful to play) 

Having the ability to download songs other people have put in the game is a great feature and I hope to see it expanded upon in the future- mostly because the offical library of songs really isn’t anything spectacular. In all, it’s a fun game that I would recommend you give a shot, and I really hope the devs keep improving on it. (And please, god, rework the drums)

This is such a brilliant and well executed concept! I absolutely love the idea of forming a band and playing multiplayer with friends. All the instruments feel great and the controls feel very natural. The graphics and environments are all really great as well. My only complaint is that you should be able to clearly hear not only the instrument you’re playing and the music in the background, but your friends’ instruments as well, so you know if they made a mistake and it makes it more cooperative and much more fun to play this way. Overall, this is such an underrated rhythm game and my second favorite after beat saber!
I've been making beat maps and playing modded songs this is probably one of the most favorite games I have it is very fun I've been playing for hours on end

developer_response.body: Wow—thank you so much! Knowing you’re diving into modded songs and loving every minute absolutely makes our day!

reviews.review_description:
The instruments come so close and the game is so bad 

I want a refund

Forced to change review. Keyboard is impossible to play miss sliding notes no matter what i try
how do you unlock outfits also?

reviews.review_title: A very cool VR-ified Rock Band!
reviews.review_description:
I love this game, it’s got so much going right for it. It’s stylish, responsive, immersive, and when I’m smashing drums I can’t help but play grinning ear-to-ear! 

The mod support in the form of custom songs is awesome and I can’t wait to see what the community comes up with. Boy, was I surprised to see some anime hits but hot dang were they just so fun!

If you’re looking for a VR alternative to Rock Band, this really does a great job capturing that feeling! Excited for its future for sure!

developer_response.body: Wow—your enthusiasm rocks! Thanks for jamming with us; we’re thrilled you’re loving the vibes and can’t wait to keep the hits coming!

reviews.review_description:
The best drum yet on quest by a country mile.

Tried the all ragnarok, paradiddle, smash drums...hated them refunded them all...not this one. Easy to understand when to hit the cues and the flow is awesome..the others don't hold a candle to this game..

Integrated custom songs just push this into 6 star territory..!! Bloody fantastic.

One request.....Dont change! 

Don't make this too complex like others have (looking at you Ragnarok!)
This game is good I some ways but one way it’s bad is the amount of characters .!!!!!!

reviews.review_title: Jack of all trades, master of none
reviews.review_description:
Doesn't offer proper support for seated play (a must for a game that features a drumming experience), no matter how much you adjust the options it just never feels right to play when seated, you'll miss or accidently hit notes all the time, even as a veteran Rock Band and Guitar Hero player.

While the guitar and piano experiences are decent ideas with unique methods of play, they just feel janky and not satisfying.

If you are eyeing this up for the drummer experience and want a proper successor to games like Rock Band (not ones that throw drums at you), then I personally suggest Smash Drums, it has fun arcade modes but also caters to those who just want a virtual drum kit and a note highway.

This game throws the kitchen sink at the wall and not much of it sticks, can't understand the glowing review it's getting at all. Refunded.

reviews.review_title: Reminds me of the rock band days!
reviews.review_description: The only place to rock out with your friends and the mod music is amazing. I’m glad they added it. Best music app on here for sure!
Me and my buddies couldn't play together. The game said we weren't on the internet tried to fix it for about 30 minutes then gave up. 0/10 Don't recommend

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your experience with us. We’re sorry you and your friends weren’t able to play together. 
Our servers were indeed hit by a malicious attack recently, causing network disruptions. Thankfully, we’ve resolved the issue, and both our online multiplayer and mod functions are back to normal now. We hope you’ll give the game another try, and we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience. We appreciate your patience and look forward to you enjoying the game with your friends.

reviews.review_description: I took way too long to buy this. If you’re a fan of rock band or guitar hero, this is a definite buy. Only one recommendation place give us some dlc skins…. The skins on there now are kinda weak.

Millennial here that grew up on guitar hero and rockband. This is a solid VR replica. MOD section is where it’s at and the added ability to play mid songs in multiplayer mode made the game so much better.
The game says I'm offline so I can't even get the mod songs which is why I got this game, the songs on there are not very good.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for letting us know about your experience. 
Our servers were recently targeted by a malicious attack, which caused the network to be temporarily stuck. 
We’ve fixed the issue, and both the online multiplayer and mod functions are now back up and running. We apologize again for any inconvenience this caused, and we hope you’ll give the game another try. Thank you for your patience, and we look forward to you enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description: Really fun (and tiring) but mostly incredibly fun, exercise too. Cracking up with my brother playing this, his review is also on here dont mark it helpful. If you're looking for a game where it feels like you're actually playing the instruments, though, this isn't like that. It's more like beatsaber, except I'd actually play this game.

If you Love musicgames like Rockband, Rocksmith or guitar Hero, this Game IS a must have. Makes so much fun, has single and Multiplayer and a list of modded songs without the need of dowloading some App to bei able to use it.

Loved playing this with my brother. The drums are a great workout. Definitely recommend the mod songs. Keep up the good work, guys! Would love to maybe see some different stages or the ability to have an npc audience or something someday.
The game is very nice but every time I click on the matchmaking button I come across bots that are muted and I've never seen a real player in a matchmaking lobby

If you're into Rock Band or Guitar Hero, then this game is a great time. The music selection is fantastic and the choice of the 4 instruments adds a lot of variety to each song. I'm really enjoying each song and I'm hoping for DLC in the future. It would be awesome to see more characters to select too.
This game is amazing it’s just lacking on the custom songs wish there would be more, the wide variety of custom songs are good for now, just can’t wait for the future of this game
It’s just bots every time, I feel like this could be huge if they were real.
There is a big silence about those bots in  multiplayer. The game is good but I'm sorry, if you lie to people making them think that they are playing with other people... You deserve 1 star.
Now the bass is a boring instrument. Please 🙏 add finger style on trigger/grip buttons and SLAP option on A button. It's a bASS it should be slapped👍👎👍👎👍👌

developer_response.body: Thank you for your detailed feedback! The finger style for bass will be added in the next update on December 5th. We'll also take the SLAP option for the A button into consideration.

reviews.review_description: Please get rid of the bots in multiplayer it is a good game other than the bots in multiplayer

reviews.review_title: Unique in the field of music games
reviews.review_description:
I thought i was burnt out on music games.  Their are some unique music   games that have recently been released, and  others are releasing soon that have renewed my interest. 

 I did not have this  game  on my list.  It sneaked up on me.  I purchased it and thought I would return it after trying it. I decided to keep it. 

  It is not the greatest music game, but it is unique enough that I find myself enjoying it. 

 I prefer the keyboard and the guitars next.  I don't like the drums at the moment, but I will do some more training and see what happens.  

The selection of songs is good, and I hope it grows.  Will be happy to purchase DLC music packs.  

The MR is great.  Wish the entire band could be part of MR.  If it can, someone please explain how to do so. 

This is a relaxing and family oriented game that can be  played solo as well.   

If you need a break from violent games or just want to feel like  a musician. This may be the game for you. 

The price is fair, but I wish it was a little cheaper.  Not that it is not a quality game, but I just like deals 😄

I rated it  4 stars because I hope the developers will continue to update it to its full potential. 

Thanks, guys, and gals. You put out a great game that has the potential to be greater.

Just had a go..has so many good cutom DLC already and u can join a lobby as any level and instruments....well worth it..vocal would be nice with a solid vote kick for trolls but not just bad singers..or mute option that would work. It's cool jumping in a lobby and finding new music people pic and put your option up for vote...I can see myself putting alot of time in this one.
Awesome game great tunes and lots of downloadable content

reviews.review_title: One of the best band experiences since..
reviews.review_description: Rock and and guitar hero was some of my favorite games. And these guys found a way to let you play like it on the quest. The controls are great for each instrument! The game is a bit forgiving but it helps you get with it! Look forward to more songs and love the addition of mod io to download songs. Wish I could do private games or so and play those songs but so far I'm happy here! Would love to see the mic used for some of the songs too so we can have the Real rock and experience!

reviews.review_title: Amazing way to return to music games
reviews.review_description:
This is the way to return to music games. Great experience, once they start to bring licensed music it will be amazing. 

Drums and Guitar are my favorite in this game and the concert scenario. I have high expectations for the future of the game.

reviews.review_title: A much needed rhythm game for VR!
reviews.review_description: Great game, really, it's super fun and the Mods are really nice to have. Just get it, you won't be disappointed, Rock On !!!

reviews.review_title: Fun game but the drumming needs tweaking
reviews.review_description: The drumming is too hard to time.  There needs to be a better indicator other than waiting for the drum to appear when the beat passes over it to hit it right.

reviews.review_title: The only one game that gives me joy
reviews.review_description: As written in the title, when I play I smile, a fan of Rockband, Guitar Hero and everything related to rhythm games, it's simple it's my favorite, I disconnect my brain and I'm even lucky to have the mods directly integrated by the developers in the game, it's joy nothing more! A thank you is not enough

Amazing game. There are many different songs you can choose from and 4 different instruments to play. You can play alone or with others in the multi-player game mode. It's also moddable. You can import "beat maps" other players have made and play them in single-player. Customs songs don't have multi-player, but they said before Christmas they will have it implemented. Very hard working dev team, and they listen to their community. If you want a VR multilayer guitar hero kinda game, then try this out! You won't regret it.

developer_response.body: Hi.Multiplayer has been updated! Band up and jam again when you have time. Hope you enjoy it!

reviews.review_description: It got mods now. That alone is amazing. I barely talking to a friend about it today and boom mods,
I enjoy this game quit alot, although I got one tiny little problem, the strumming can feel quite unresponsive at times, might just be my controllers i dont know

If you’re into rockband, guitar hero or even beat saber this is a game for you. There’s always people playing. You can play in solo or in co op multiplayer for up to four people. Bass, guitar, drums and piano. They got a good selection of catchy songs. 

I particularly like how the instruments are integrated into the game making the gameplay challenging and enjoyable. 

I love music and therefore, I really enjoy this game, having also being a multi instrumentalist myself, I can tell the peeps behind the game put in all the love they have for music while developing it. 

I can’t wait for future updates to this already meaty game.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your awesome review! 🎸 We're thrilled you’re enjoying the game and love the music integration. Stay tuned for more updates and keep rocking!

reviews.review_description: The game is fun the games songs are good and very content heavy with 5 music packs 4 different instruments and a mod menu but I just wish you can play multiplayer with modded songs just imagine if you could play all I want for Christmas is you with my buds

developer_response.body: The multiplayer update for mod songs will roll out on December 5th. Thank you for your continued support!

reviews.review_description: Played the demo game really good fun purchased the full version  I played the drums

The game itself is pretty good (besides the hit detection on the drums being kinda dookie) The only thing is there are no songs on here that youll know. It's all royalty free tracks that my baby niece listens to while she watches dancing fruit on YouTube (not even joking)

developer_response.body:
Thank you for giving our game a shot! 
We're thrilled you enjoyed it. All our official songs are licensed from talented musicians! And we're constantly adding more tracks to the library.
Plus, we've got mod support in-game, and our awesome community is large and still growing. 
Hope you stick around and keep on rocking!

reviews.review_description: It reminds me of Rock Band. It's a fun game, I'm getting everyone I know to get this game. However on the mods It needs more band songs like Aerosmith, saliva, disturb, deep purple, iron butterfly, CCR, more bon Jovi, more ac/dc, definitely more Metallica. It needs less solo artist songs, bands don't want to play those kinds of songs they are more for a singing feature that this does not have.maybe add it later? Needs more Avatar selection or customize them.

reviews.review_title: Didn't think I needed a drum game, but..
reviews.review_description: But the availabile mods with lots of songs and custom maps sold me!  Can't wait to add a few of my own.  Great job!

reviews.review_title: I’m so glad I bought this game
reviews.review_description: Highly recommended this game for everyone and playing the drums is great and mods for the game is good they just need to add some more but overall a 9/10 game

Thank you for the game. 
1. Can add audience/singer. Doesn't need to play instruments 
2. Adjust more different height.Even the lowest height, the keyboard is still high. I want play sitting so bad

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We will consider both suggestion.

reviews.review_description: No complaints, its a fun rhythm game, hopefully someone puts out a video tutorial on how to make mods for this game cause i haven't found one yet 😅

developer_response.body: Thanks for your support! A new editor is coming soon and it will be much easier to use. More tutorial video will be made.
